exercises.name: Banded Ankle Mobilization
exercises.instructions: Anchor a band behind you, loop it low on the front of the ankle (just above the joint line). Half-kneeling with that foot forward. Drive the knee forward over the toes. The band pulls the talus back, opening the joint.
exercises.cue: Band pulls the ankle back as the knee drives forward. Heel stays down.

exercises.name: Banded Fire Hydrants
exercises.instructions: On all fours, band above knees. Lift one bent knee out to the side (like a dog at a fire hydrant). Keep back flat, pelvis square.
exercises.cue: Hips stay level; don't rotate. Band tension throughout.

exercises.name: Banded Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: Lie on back, mini-band above knees, feet flat. Drive through heels to lift hips AND push knees out against the band simultaneously. Integrates extension with external rotation.
exercises.cue: Push knees OUT as you drive up. Squeeze at the top, ribs down.

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walks
exercises.instructions: Band above knees (or above ankles for harder). Quarter squat. Step sideways keeping tension on the band. Toes forward, not splayed.
exercises.cue: Stay low; don't bob up and down. Tension on the band at all times.

exercises.name: Side-Lying Clamshells (Banded)
exercises.instructions: Lie on side with band just above knees, feet stacked, knees bent ~45°. Keep pelvis still and feet together as you open the top knee. Tempo: 2s up, 2s hold, 3s down.
exercises.cue: Pelvis does NOT roll back. If felt in front of hip, reduce range.

exercises.name: Eccentric Calf Raise (Bent Knee)
exercises.instructions: Same setup as straight-knee version, but maintain a 20-30 degree knee bend throughout. Targets the soleus.
exercises.cue: Knee bend stays consistent top to bottom.

exercises.name: Eccentric Calf Raise (Straight Knee)
exercises.instructions: Stand on a step with heels hanging off. Rise onto both toes, shift weight to the working leg, then lower the heel below the step over 3 seconds. Use the other leg to return to the top.
exercises.cue: 3-second descent. Don't bounce at the bottom.

exercises.name: Figure-4 Stretch (Reclining Pigeon)
exercises.instructions: Lie on back. Cross one ankle over the opposite knee (figure-4 shape). Grab the back of the supporting thigh and pull toward your chest. Stretch is felt in the outer hip / glute of the crossed leg.
exercises.cue: Keep shoulders flat on the floor. Gentle, long hold.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.instructions: Half-kneeling: one knee on the ground, other foot forward at 90°. Squeeze the glute on the kneeling side, then shift hips forward. Stretch is felt at the front of the kneeling-side hip.
exercises.cue: Glute squeeze BEFORE the shift — passive stretch alone is weaker.

exercises.name: Isometric Seated External Rotation
exercises.instructions: Seated with knee bent 90°. Cross the ankle over the opposite thigh. Press the ankle gently upward into your hand (isometric). Hold and feel the deep glute engage.
exercises.cue: No joint movement — just tension. Feel the deep-glute contraction.

exercises.name: Plantar Fascia Roll
exercises.instructions: Seated or standing, roll the sole of the foot over a lacrosse ball or frozen water bottle. Pause on tender spots for 10-15 seconds.
exercises.cue: Pressure should be uncomfortable, not sharp.

exercises.name: Seated Soleus Stretch
exercises.instructions: Seated in a chair, foot flat. Lean forward, pressing the knee out over the toes while keeping the heel planted. Stretch is felt deep in the lower calf.
exercises.cue: Heel down, knee tracks over toes. Mild-to-moderate stretch, not painful.

exercises.name: Side-Lying Hip Abduction
exercises.instructions: Lie on one side, bottom leg bent for stability. Lift the top leg straight up with toe pointed slightly toward the ceiling. Lower under control.
exercises.cue: Toe rotates up (not down). Lift ~30-45°, not higher.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: Lie on back, one foot flat on floor, other leg extended or held at chest. Drive through the planted heel to lift hips. Hold 1 sec at top, lower under control.
exercises.cue: Squeeze glute hard at the top; ribs stay down.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Stand on one leg, soft knee. Hinge at the hips, back flat, trailing leg extends behind you. Drive through the heel to stand, squeezing the glute at the top.
exercises.cue: Standing knee tracks over the 2nd toe — NO valgus collapse.

exercises.name: Wall Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.instructions: Face a wall in a half-kneeling position. Place the front foot a few inches from the wall. Drive the front knee forward over the toes, keeping the heel flat on the floor. Hold.
exercises.cue: Knee tracks straight over the toes; heel never lifts.
